evidence_spans: Hybrid retrieval merges geometric and logic candidates.
Score equals alpha times the HNSW score plus beta times the logic score.
edge_card_text: [REL=implementation_detail] hybrid retrieval uses candidate fusion scoring for logical targets

evidence_spans: The sidecar graph is used after initial HNSW recall.
The jump policy allows one-hop expansion with confidence and relevance gates.
edge_card_text: [REL=implementation_detail] logic overlay graph is queried through jump policy gates

evidence_spans: DeepAgents uses subagents for isolated work.
edge_card_text: [REL=implementation_detail] deepagents overview delegates work to subagents

evidence_spans: DeepAgents routes memories through persistent backends.
edge_card_text: [REL=implementation_detail] deepagents overview includes long-term memory routing

evidence_spans: A document profiler subagent can summarize a paper.

evidence_spans: A corpus scout subagent can search summaries and local files.

evidence_spans: A judge subagent can verify pair relations.

evidence_spans: A memory curator subagent maintains memory.

evidence_spans: The scout proposes candidates before judging.

evidence_spans: Workers use a SQLite job registry.
